source.book: 《9分达人雅思听力真题还原及解析6》

segments.text: Roger: Good morning.
segments.translation: 早上好。

segments.text: Roger: This is the Customer Service Department of Kingswell Washing Machine.
segments.translation: 这里是金斯威尔洗衣机公司的客户服务部。

segments.text: Roger: Roger speaking, how may I help you?
segments.translation: 我是罗杰，请问有什么可以帮您？

segments.text: Woman: Good morning.
segments.translation: 早上好。

segments.text: Woman: I'm calling about the washing machine I bought from the mall several months ago.
segments.translation: 我想咨询一下几个月前我在商场买的一台洗衣机。

segments.text: Woman: There's something wrong with it at the moment, so what do I have to do?
segments.translation: 它现在出了点问题，所以我该怎么办呢？

segments.text: Roger: OK, first I need to get a few details about this.
segments.translation: 好的，首先我需要了解几个相关信息。

segments.text: Roger: Could you give me your name, please?
segments.translation: 请问您怎么称呼？

segments.text: Woman: Yes, it's Judie Smith.
segments.translation: 好的，我叫朱迪·史密斯。

segments.text: Roger: OK.
segments.translation: 好的。

segments.text: Roger: I need one more thing.
segments.translation: 我还需要一样东西。

segments.text: Roger: There's a reference number.
segments.translation: 有一个参考编号。

segments.text: Roger: It should be in the top right-hand corner of the warranty card we gave you.
segments.translation: 它应该在我们给您的保修卡右上角。

segments.text: Woman: Let me have a look … Oh, here it is.
segments.translation: 我找找看……哦，在这儿呢。

segments.text: Woman: It's CWX576884.
Roger: Thanks.
segments.translation: 谢谢。

segments.text: Roger: Well, I need to make sure if your washing machine is still within the warranty period, so when did you buy it?
segments.translation: 那我需要确认一下您的洗衣机是否还在保修期内，请问您是什么时候买的？

segments.text: Woman: Oh, sure.
segments.translation: 哦，好的。

segments.text: Woman: I remember I bought it last summer, so … it was about 9 months ago.
segments.translation: 我记得是去年夏天买的，所以……大概是九个月前吧。

segments.text: Woman: And the card here says this washing machine has a 2-year warranty, so it's definitely within the period.
segments.translation: 而且这卡上写着这台洗衣机有两年保修，所以肯定还在保修期内。

segments.text: Roger: Of course it is, Madam.
segments.translation: 那当然，女士。

segments.text: Roger: All right, then I need your address?
segments.translation: 好的，那我需要您的地址。

segments.text: Woman: My old address or my current one?
segments.translation: 是我的旧地址还是现在的地址？

segments.text: Roger: Your current one, as we will send in someone to fix the washing machine for you.
segments.translation: 您现在的地址，因为我们要派人上门帮您修洗衣机。

segments.text: Woman: It's 120 Middle Street, Oxford.
segments.translation: 是牛津市米德尔街120号。

segments.text: Roger: And the postcode?
segments.translation: 那邮编呢？

segments.text: Woman: It's GO19 4KE.
segments.translation: 是 GO19 4KE。

segments.text: Roger: Now I need to know the exact problem of the washing machine.
segments.translation: 现在我需要了解一下洗衣机具体是什么问题。

segments.text: Roger: Could you describe it in detail?
segments.translation: 您能详细描述一下吗？

segments.text: Woman: Actually the washing machine did work very well until last weekend.
segments.translation: 其实这台洗衣机一直用得挺好，直到上个周末才出问题。

segments.text: Woman: I put some clothes into it, and it worked normally at first, then I just got down to doing some gardening.
segments.translation: 我放了些衣服进去，一开始运转正常，然后我就去弄花园了。

segments.text: Woman: But after about 30 minutes when I came back to the house, I found it was leaking!
segments.translation: 但大概过了三十分钟，我回到屋里，发现它在漏水！

segments.text: Woman: The water had soaked the entire floor.
segments.translation: 水把整个地板都浸湿了。

segments.text: Roger: I'm sorry to hear that, Madam.
segments.translation: 很抱歉听到这个情况，女士。

segments.text: Roger: So did you do anything to make the leaking stop?
segments.translation: 那您有没有采取什么措施让它停止漏水？

segments.text: Woman: At that moment, the washing machine was totally out of control, and the alarm on it also started to sound.
segments.translation: 当时那台洗衣机完全失控了，上面的警报也响了起来。

segments.text: Woman: I thought there was not much point in pressing any button on the machine, so I just switched off the machine straight away.
segments.translation: 我觉得按机器上任何按钮都没什么用，所以我就直接把机器关掉了。

segments.text: Woman: Then it stopped leaking at once, thank goodness!
segments.translation: 然后它立刻就不漏了，谢天谢地！

segments.text: Roger: Well, I think that was the only thing you could do.
segments.translation: 嗯，我觉得那是您当时唯一能做的事了。

segments.text: Woman: Oh then, I found my floor was nearly a disaster.
segments.translation: 对了，后来我发现地板简直成了灾难。

segments.text: Woman: As it is made of wood rather than marble, it could not be soaked in water for a long time, so what I did in the next 2 hours was wiping up the water on the floor!
segments.translation: 因为地板是木头做的，不是大理石的，泡在水里太久可不行，所以接下来两个小时我都在擦地板上的水！

segments.text: Roger: Right.
segments.translation: 好的。

segments.text: Woman: Later I tried the washing machine once more, but the problem still existed.
segments.translation: 后来我又试了一次洗衣机，但问题还是没解决。

segments.text: Roger: Well, I've taken down all the related information.
segments.translation: 好的，相关信息我都记下来了。

segments.text: Roger: Later we'll send a client engineer to your house to fix it.
segments.translation: 稍后我们会派一位客户工程师上门帮您修。

segments.text: Woman: OK.
segments.translation: 好的。

segments.text: Woman: Could you arrange the repair work as soon as possible, as I'm too busy at work to do the laundry by hand?
segments.translation: 您能尽快安排维修吗？我工作太忙了，实在没法用手洗衣服。

segments.text: Woman: How about this Saturday?
segments.translation: 这周六怎么样？

segments.text: Roger: Umm … I have to check the schedule of the repairman … Oh sorry, Madam, Saturday has been occupied.
segments.translation: 嗯……我得查一下维修师傅的排期……哦抱歉，女士，周六已经排满了。

segments.text: Roger: The earliest day we can arrange for you is next Tuesday.
segments.translation: 我们最早能给您安排的是下周二。

segments.text: Roger: Is that OK with you?
segments.translation: 您看这样行吗？

segments.text: Woman: Fine, I can take a leave from work that day.
segments.translation: 行，那天我可以请个假。

segments.text: Woman: Anyway, thanks.
segments.translation: 不管怎样，谢谢你。

segments.text: Woman: Oh, my house is easy to find.
segments.translation: 哦对了，我家很好找。

segments.text: Woman: It's near the Central Market, just across from the Post Office.
segments.translation: 就在中央市场附近，正好在邮局对面。

segments.text: Roger: All right.
segments.translation: 好的。

segments.text: Roger: And the last thing, could you tell me your phone number, please?
segments.translation: 最后一件事，能麻烦您告诉我您的电话号码吗？

segments.text: Woman: Sure.
segments.translation: 当然。

segments.text: Woman: It's 3864 7757.
Roger: OK.
segments.translation: 好的。

segments.text: Roger: I've got it.
segments.translation: 我记下来了。

segments.text: Roger: The repairman will contact you before he comes.
segments.translation: 维修师傅上门前会先联系您。

segments.text: Woman: OK.
segments.translation: 好的。

segments.text: Woman: Thank you very much.
segments.translation: 非常感谢。

segments.text: Roger: You're welcome.
segments.translation: 不客气。

segments.text: Roger: Bye!
segments.translation: 再见！

segments.text: Woman: Bye!
segments.translation: 再见！
